## 1. Executive Summary

The **Ocean Schedules** module (`ocean-schedules`) is a Java microservice within the WiseTech Global Mercury Services platform. Its primary purpose is to aggregate ocean carrier vessel schedules from multiple data sources and expose them through a unified REST API to INTTRA platform users and third-party API consumers.

### Core responsibilities

- **Schedule search:** Accept a port-pair + date search request and return a merged, enriched list of schedules from Elasticsearch (EDI-fed data) and, optionally, real-time external carrier APIs.
- **Carrier management:** Maintain a registry of carrier port-pairs (origin/destination UN location codes per SCAC) with full CRUD operations and request-payload generation.
- **Service enablement:** Track rate-limiting token budgets per external service so downstream batch processes can throttle API calls appropriately.
- **Async pipeline orchestration:** Trigger Staging, Loader, Outbound, and Aggregator processes for one or more carriers by publishing to dedicated AWS SNS topics.
- **User data management:** Persist and retrieve per-user recent searches (up to 12, deduplicated) and user preferences via MySQL.
- **Vessel lookup:** Provide vessel detail lookup by IMO number.

### Data sources

| Source | How it is used |
|--------|----------------|
| Elasticsearch (`oceanschedulesdata-{SCAC}-*`) | Primary schedule store — data loaded from EDI files via the async pipeline |
| Elasticsearch (`os-pre-fetch-{SCAC}-*`) | Pre-fetched schedule cache from carrier APIs, written by the Loader Lambda |
| External carrier APIs (12+ carriers) | Real-time schedule retrieval at query time (now replaced by Elasticsearch pipeline; client code is retained for reference) |
| DynamoDB `os_realtime_cache` | In-flight request lock table and short-lived carrier API response cache |
| DynamoDB `schedules_pro_staging` | Staging store used by the Loader/Outbound pipeline |
| AWS S3 | Raw EDI file storage; folder layout encodes SCAC codes |
| MySQL (Aurora) | Port-pair registry, service enablement, vessel details, cutoff offsets, user data |
| Mercury Participants Service | Authoritative source of carrier metadata (name, carrierId, inttraCompanyId, SCAC) |
| Mercury Geography Service | UN Location code resolution, alternate codes, city/country names |

## 3. High-Level Architecture Diagram

```
                          ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
                          │                   OCEAN SCHEDULES MICROSERVICE                              │
                          │                                                                             │
  ┌─────────┐  HTTPS/JWT  │  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
  │ Browser │────────────►│  │                    REST API Layer  (JAX-RS / Dropwizard)               │  │
  │   SPA   │             │  │                                                                        │  │
  └─────────┘             │  │  GET  /schedule            ScheduleResource                           │  │
                          │  │  GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /carrier/*   CarrierResource                      │  │
  ┌─────────┐  HTTPS/JWT  │  │  GET  /apicarriers         SubscribedCarrierResource                  │  │
  │API Client│───────────►│  │  GET/PUT /recentsearches   RecentSearchResource                       │  │
  └─────────┘             │  │  GET/PUT /user-preferences UserPreferenceResource                     │  │
                          │  │  GET    /vesseldetails     VesselDetailsResource                      │  │
                          │  │  POST   /process-maintenance/*    OSProcessResource                   │  │
                          │  └──────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │
                          │                 │                                                           │
                          │  ┌──────────────▼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
                          │  │                   Service Layer                                        │  │
                          │  │  ScheduleSearchService  ─── InttraScheduleCollector                   │  │
                          │  │       │                          │          │                          │  │
                          │  │  EnrichmentService         ElasticSearch  ExternalClientFactory        │  │
                          │  │  CarrierService            Client         (deprecated runtime calls)   │  │
                          │  │  RecentSearchService                                                   │  │
                          │  │  UserPreferenceService                                                 │  │
                          │  │  VesselDetailsService                                                  │  │
                          │  │  CutoffOffsetService                                                   │  │
                          │  │  OSProcessService  ──────────────────────► SNSClient                  │  │
                          │  └──────────────┬───────────────────────────────────┬────────────────────┘  │
                          │                 │                                   │                        │
                          │  ┌──────────────▼──────────┐          ┌────────────▼──────────────────┐     │
                          │  │  Persistence Layer       │          │  AWS Integration Layer         │     │
                          │  │                          │          │                                │     │
                          │  │  MySQL (Aurora)          │          │  SNSClient                     │     │
                          │  │  ├ PortPairMapper         │          │  ├ Staging ARN                 │     │
                          │  │  ├ UserDataMapper         │          │  ├ Loader ARN                  │     │
                          │  │  ├ VesselDetailsMapper    │          │  ├ Outbound ARN                 │     │
                          │  │  └ CutoffOffsetMapper     │          │  └ Aggregator ARN               │     │
                          │  │                          │          │                                │     │
                          │  │  DynamoDB                │          │  S3Service                     │     │
                          │  │  ├ os_realtime_cache      │          │  └ oceanschedules bucket       │     │
                          │  │  └ schedules_pro_staging  │          │                                │     │
                          │  └─────────────────────────┘          └───────────────────────────────┘     │
                          └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                           │                    │
              ┌────────────────────────────┘                    └──────────────────────┐
              ▼                                                                         ▼
  ┌─────────────────────┐                                             ┌─────────────────────────┐
  │   ELASTICSEARCH     │                                             │    MERCURY NETWORK       │
  │                     │                                             │    SERVICES              │
  │  oceanschedulesdata │                                             │                          │
  │   -{SCAC}-*         │                                             │  Participants API        │
  │  (EDI schedules)    │                                             │  Geography API           │
  │                     │                                             │  Auth API                │
  │  os-pre-fetch-      │                                             └─────────────────────────┘
  │   {SCAC}-*          │
  │  (API pre-fetched)  │
  └─────────────────────┘
```

## 4. Key Classes Reference

### Resources (REST Endpoints)

| Class | Package | Role |
|-------|---------|------|
| `ScheduleResource` | `resources` | `GET /schedule` — schedule search, delegates to `ScheduleSearchService` |
| `CarrierResource` | `resources` | Full CRUD for carrier port-pairs and service-enablement entries |
| `SubscribedCarrierResource` | `resources` | `GET /apicarriers` — lists carriers with API data source type |
| `RecentSearchResource` | `resources` | `GET/PUT /recentsearches` — recent port-pair searches per user |
| `UserPreferenceResource` | `resources` | `GET/PUT /user-preferences` — schedule UI preferences per user |
| `VesselDetailsResource` | `resources` | `GET /vesseldetails?imoNumber=` — vessel lookup by IMO |
| `OSProcessResource` | `resources` | `POST /process-maintenance/*` — trigger/purge async pipeline stages |

### Services

| Class | Package | Role |
|-------|---------|------|
| `ScheduleSearchService` | `service` | Orchestrates validate → collect → enrich pipeline |
| `InttraScheduleCollector` | `service` | Fetches schedules from Elasticsearch (primary) and applies directOnly filter |
| `EnrichmentService` | `service` | Enriches raw schedules with city/country names, cutoff offsets, duration, vessel defaults |
| `CarrierService` | `service` | Carrier data, port-pair CRUD, S3/ES purge, service enablement operations |
| `RecentSearchService` | `service` | Manage 12-slot rolling recent-search list with deduplication |
| `UserPreferenceService` | `service` | User preference persistence |
| `VesselDetailsService` | `service` | Vessel details lookup from MySQL |
| `CutoffOffsetService` | `service` | Cutoff-offset lookup by SCAC + origin location |
| `OSProcessService` | `service` | SNS message construction and dispatch for all pipeline stages |

### External API Clients

| Class | Package | Role |
|-------|---------|------|
| `ExternalClient<T>` | `client.external` | Abstract base — request construction, HTTP call, retry, DynamoDB locking, ES fallback |
| `ExternalClientFactory` | `client.external` | SCAC-to-ExternalClient registry (ConcurrentHashMap) |
| `ElasticSearchClient` | `client.external.elasticsearch` | Builds and executes ES bool queries; maps results to `InttraSchedule` |
| `ExternalClientInterface` | `client.external` | Contract: `getSchedules(Map)` |

### Carrier Port-Pair Request Builders

| Class | SCAC(s) | Notes |
|-------|---------|-------|
| `MaerskPortPairBuilder` | MAEU, SEAU, SEJJ | Uses `MaerskLocationClient` to resolve city/country for API payload |
| `MscPortpairBuilder` | MSCU | Generates MSC-specific request format |
| `CmaPortpairBuilder` | CMDU | CMA CGM format |
| `ZimPortpairBuilder` | ZIMU | ZIM Line format |
| `HapagLloydPortpairBuilder` | HLCU | Hapag-Lloyd format |
| `HmmPortpairBuilder` | HDMU | HMM format with `HmmRequest` model |
| `EvergreenPortPairBuilder` | EGLV | Evergreen Marine format |
| `NeptunePortpairBuilder` | NPPB | Neptune Lines format using `NeptuneRequest` |
| `SwirePortpairBuilder` | SMAN | Swire Shipping format using `SwireRequest` |
| `MarfretPortpairBuilder` | MRFR | Marfret format |
| `SeaLeadPortpairBuilder` | SEAL | SeaLead format |
| `WisetechPortpairBuilder` | (internal) | WiseTech test/internal adapter |

### Persistence (DAO / Mapper layer)

| Class | Storage | Role |
|-------|---------|------|
| `PortPairDao` / `PortPairMapper` | MySQL | CRUD on `carrier_port_pair` and `service_enablement` tables |
| `UserDataDao` / `UserDataMapper` | MySQL | JSON blob storage for recent searches and preferences |
| `ScheduleVesselDetailsDao` / `ScheduleVesselDetailsMapper` | MySQL | Vessel detail lookup |
| `ScheduleCutoffOffsetDao` / `ScheduleCutoffOffsetMapper` | MySQL | Cutoff offset by SCAC + location |
| `SchedulesProStagingDao` | DynamoDB (`schedules_pro_staging`) | Determines which API carriers have staged data |
| `RealTimeCacheDao` | DynamoDB (`os_realtime_cache`) | Read/write carrier API response cache with optimistic locking |

### Configuration Classes

| Class | Role |
|-------|------|
| `OceanSchedulesConfig` | Root Dropwizard config — aggregates all sub-configs |
| `ElasticSearchConfig` | ES endpoint URL, index name, timeouts, retries |
| `SNSConfig` | ARNs for the four SNS topics |
| `S3Config` | Bucket name, OS data paths, purge paths |
| `ExternalServiceDefinition` | Per-carrier API config: URI, method, headers, query params, retry, cache TTL, SCAC list |
| `MscAuthServiceDefinition` | MSC OAuth endpoint/credentials |
| `OneAuthServiceDefinition` | ONE (Ocean Network Express) OAuth |
| `ZimAuthServiceDefinition` | ZIM OAuth |
| `EvergreenAuthServiceDefinition` | Evergreen OAuth |
| `TimezoneServiceDefinition` | Timezone service endpoint |
| `HapagLloydAuthServiceDefinition` | Hapag-Lloyd OAuth |

### Model Classes

| Class | Package | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `InttraSchedule` | `model` | Canonical schedule: SCAC, vessel, voyage, origin/dest UNLOC, dates (departure, arrival, all cutoffs), legs list, schedule type |
| `InttraLeg` | `model` | Transshipment leg: sequence, transportType, departureUnloc/date, arrivalUnloc/date, IMO, duration |
| `CutoffOffset` | `model` | Terminal cutoff offset value for a SCAC+location; also contains `OSProcessStatus` inner class |
| `VesselDetails` | `model` | Vessel IMO, name, type, flag, gross tonnage |
| `RealTimeCache` | `dynamodb` | DynamoDB item: cacheKey (hash), lock state, expiry, serialized `InttraSchedule` list |
| `SchedulesProStaging` | `dynamodb` | DynamoDB item: scac (hash) + portPairIndicator (range), scheduleJson, expiry |
| `PortPair` | `persistence.portpair.model` | MySQL row: id, scac, load/destination UNLOC, supportedByCarrier flag, requestPayload JSON, processDate |
| `ServiceEnablement` | `persistence.serviceenablement` | MySQL row: id, externalServiceName, tokenCount, tokenInterval, tokenIntervalUnit, enabledFlag |
| `LocationSearch` | `persistence.userData.model` | Serialized recent search: originPort, destinationPort, timestamp, enriched geography |
| `UserPreference` | `persistence.userData.model` | User's preferred carriers, display settings |
| `ScheduleUserData` | `persistence.userData.model` | Generic MySQL JSON blob wrapper: userId, userDataType, content |

### DI / Application Bootstrap

| Class | Role |
|-------|------|
| `OceanSchedulesApplication` | Main entry point; registers resources, mappers, exception mappers, and module generators |
| `OceanschedulesModule` | Guice `AbstractModule`; binds all services, AWS clients, Multibinders for `ExternalClient` and `PortPairRequestBuilder` |
| `AWSClientConfiguration` | `ClientConfiguration` presets for SNS and S3 |

## 5. Schedule Search Data Flow

```
 Client Request: GET /schedule?originPort=USLAX&destinationPort=CNSHA
                 &searchDate=2026-05-10&searchDateType=ByDepartureDate
                 &weeksOut=3&scacs=MSCU,MAEU&directOnly=false
                 Authorization: Bearer <JWT>

 ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
 │ 1. ScheduleResource.getSchedules()                                   │
 │    - Extract MultivaluedMap from UriInfo                             │
 │    - Delegate to ScheduleSearchService                               │
 └─────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                           │
 ┌─────────────────────────▼────────────────────────────────────────────┐
 │ 2. UserSearchRequestValidator.validate()                              │
 │                                                                      │
 │  a) Required params check:                                           │
 │     originPort, destinationPort, searchDate,                         │
 │     searchDateType, weeksOut  ─── all 5 must be present             │
 │                                                                      │
 │  b) Optional params harvested:                                       │
 │     scacs, directOnly, includeNearbyOriginPorts,                    │
 │     includeNearbyDestinationPorts, services, vesselName              │
 │                                                                      │
 │  c) validateSearchDateType()   ByDepartureDate | ByArrivalDate       │
 │  d) validateSearchDateValue()  yyyy-MM-dd                            │
 │  e) validateWeeksOut()         1 ≤ weeksOut ≤ 6                     │
 │  f) validateBooleanValue()     directOnly, includeNearby* flags      │
 │                                                                      │
 │  g) validateCarrier()                                                │
 │     - Call NetworkParticipantClient.getScacCodes()                  │
 │       ↳ Guava LoadingCache (1440-min TTL)                           │
 │       ↳ On miss: query Participants API + Elasticsearch aggregation  │
 │     - If scacs param absent → use ALL valid scac codes              │
 │     - Else → split comma-separated, remove invalid codes            │
 │     - Store as ENRICH_SCAC_CODE_SET in params map                   │
 │                                                                      │
 │  h) validatePorts()                                                  │
 │     For EACH of originPort and destinationPort:                     │
 │       ① GeographyClient.getGeoLocationDataByCode(unloc)            │
 │          ↳ Calls Mercury Geography Service REST API                  │
 │          ↳ Returns Geography with UNLOC, city, country,             │
 │            subdivision, and associated/alternate codes               │
 │       ② Build unloc set:                                            │
 │          - Primary UNLOC                                             │
 │          - All alternate codes from Geography.getIdentifiersAndAssociations()  │
 │          - If includeNearby=true: add all ports in same port group  │
 │            (via surroundingPortMapping config map)                   │
 │       ③ Store Geography object and expanded unloc set in params map │
 │                                                                      │
 │  Returns Map<String, Object> with all resolved params               │
 └─────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                           │
 ┌─────────────────────────▼────────────────────────────────────────────┐
 │ 3. InttraScheduleCollector.getSchedules()                             │
 │                                                                      │
 │  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
 │  │  getSchedulesFromElasticSearch(scacSet, params)              │   │
 │  │                                                              │   │
 │  │  ElasticSearchClient.getSchedules()                          │   │
 │  │   ─ Builds ES bool query:                                   │   │
 │  │       must: termsQuery(carrierId, [resolved carrier IDs])    │   │
 │  │       filter: rangeQuery(                                    │   │
 │  │                 originDepartureDate.keyword  OR              │   │
 │  │                 destinationArrivalDate.keyword,              │   │
 │  │                 from=searchDate, to=searchDate+weeksOut+1d)  │   │
 │  │       filter: termsQuery(originUnloc.keyword, [unlocSet])    │   │
 │  │       filter: termsQuery(destinationUnloc.keyword, [unlocSet])│  │
 │  │   ─ Search index: config.elasticSearchConfig.oceanschedulesIndex │
 │  │   ─ Size: 500 results max                                   │   │
 │  │   ─ Maps JSON source docs → InttraSchedule via ObjectMapper  │   │
 │  │   ─ Sets scheduleType = transshipment/unspecified if absent  │   │
 │  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
 │                                                                      │
 │  applyDirectOnlyFilter()                                            │
 │   ─ If directOnly=true: keep only schedules with null/empty legs    │
 │                                                                      │
 └─────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                           │
 ┌─────────────────────────▼────────────────────────────────────────────┐
 │ 4. EnrichmentService.enrichSchedules()                                │
 │                                                                      │
 │  For each InttraSchedule:                                           │
 │                                                                      │
 │  a) enrichScheduleCarrierName()                                      │
 │     - If carrierName is null, lookup by SCAC in NetworkParticipantClient │
 │       and set carrierName from CarrierData                          │
 │                                                                      │
 │  b) enrichScheduleOriginPort()                                       │
 │     - If originUnloc in originPortAlternatives → use cached Geography │
 │     - Else → GeographyClient.getGeoLocationDataByCode(originUnloc) │
 │     - Sets originCityName, originSubdivision, originCountry         │
 │                                                                      │
 │  c) enrichScheduleDestinationPort()                                  │
 │     - Same pattern as origin for destination fields                  │
 │                                                                      │
 │  d) enrichScheduleCutoffDate()                                       │
 │     - If terminalCutoff is null:                                     │
 │       CutoffOffsetService.getByScacAndLocation(scac, originUnloc)   │
 │       If offset found: estimatedTerminalCutoff = originDepartureDate │
 │                         - terminalCutoffOffset days                  │
 │                                                                      │
 │  e) enrichScheduleDuration()                                         │
 │     - totalDuration = ChronoUnit.DAYS between                       │
 │       originDepartureDate and destinationArrivalDate                │
 │                                                                      │
 │  f) enrichLegs()                                                     │
 │     - For each InttraLeg: enrich departure and arrival port names,  │
 │       set transitDuration                                            │
 │     - If any leg has blank departureUnloc or arrivalUnloc → mark   │
 │       legsValid = false                                              │
 │                                                                      │
 │  g) enrichVesselName()                                              │
 │     - If vesselName is null/empty → set "TO BE DECIDED"             │
 │                                                                      │
 │  h) removeIf() — remove schedules missing:                          │
 │     - originDepartureDate, destinationArrivalDate                    │
 │     - voyageNumber, originUnloc, destinationUnloc, or invalid legs  │
 │                                                                      │
 └─────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                           │
 ┌─────────────────────────▼──────────────┐
 │ 5. Response                            │
 │  HTTP 200 with List<InttraSchedule>    │
 │  JSON, serialized by Jackson           │
 │  Datetime format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"│
 └────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 6. External Carrier Integration Design

### Overview

All carrier-specific adapters follow the same layered pattern. At runtime, the current codebase fetches all schedules from Elasticsearch. The real-time carrier API path is preserved in the codebase but the `ExternalClient` bindings in `OceanschedulesModule` are commented out — carriers are served via Elasticsearch populated by the async pipeline.

### Adapter Inheritance Hierarchy

```
 ExternalClientInterface
      |
      └─ ExternalClient<T>  (abstract)
             ├─ Handles: HTTP GET/POST, retry, DynamoDB locking, ES fallback, caching
             ├─ Abstract methods:
             │     mapInputQueryParamsToCarrierRequestQueryParams(Map) → MultivaluedMap
             │     mapCarrierResponseToSchedules(T) → List<InttraSchedule>
             │     getResponseType() → GenericType<T>
             │
             └─ Carrier-specific subclasses (one per carrier group)
```

### PortPairRequestBuilder Pattern

The `PortPairRequestBuilder` interface is orthogonal to the `ExternalClient` hierarchy and serves the port-pair registry feature:

```
 PortPairRequestBuilder (interface)
   - buildRequestFromPortPair(PortPair) → Map<String,Object>
   - buildJsonRequestFromPortPair(PortPair) → String (JSON)
   - getScacs() → List<String>

 Implementations (registered via Guice Multibinder):
   MaerskPortPairBuilder       → MAEU, SEAU, SEJJ
   MscPortpairBuilder          → MSCU
   CmaPortpairBuilder          → CMDU
   ZimPortpairBuilder          → ZIMU
   HapagLloydPortpairBuilder   → HLCU
   HmmPortpairBuilder          → HDMU
   EvergreenPortPairBuilder     → EGLV
   NeptunePortpairBuilder       → NPPB
   SwirePortpairBuilder         → SMAN
   MarfretPortpairBuilder       → MRFR
   SeaLeadPortpairBuilder       → SEAL
   WisetechPortpairBuilder      → (internal)
```

### Carrier Registry: All 12+ Supported Carriers

| # | Carrier | SCAC | Data Source | Special Auth |
|---|---------|------|-------------|--------------|
| 1 | Maersk | MAEU / SEAU / SEJJ | API (pre-fetch) | MaerskLocationClient for city lookup |
| 2 | MSC | MSCU | API | `MscAuthServiceDefinition` OAuth |
| 3 | CMA CGM | CMDU | API | CMA headers/queryParams |
| 4 | ZIM | ZIMU | API | `ZimAuthServiceDefinition` OAuth |
| 5 | Hapag-Lloyd | HLCU | API | `HapagLloydAuthServiceDefinition` OAuth |
| 6 | HMM (Hyundai) | HDMU | API | Standard bearer |
| 7 | Evergreen | EGLV | API | `EvergreenAuthServiceDefinition` OAuth |
| 8 | Neptune | NPPB | API | Standard bearer |
| 9 | Swire | SMAN | API | SwireRequest body format |
| 10 | Marfret | MRFR | API | Standard |
| 11 | SeaLead | SEAL | API | Standard |
| 12 | WiseTech (internal) | varies | API | Internal |
| 13+ | EDI-only carriers | various | EDI (S3 → ES) | No direct API |

### ExternalClient Request Flow (when active)

```
 InttraScheduleCollector.getSchedulesFromExternalApi()
       │
       ├─ parallelStream over requested SCACs
       │       │
       │       └─ ExternalClientFactory.getExternalClient(scac)
       │                │
       │                └─ ExternalClient.getSchedules(params)
       │                         │
       │                         ├─ buildRequests()
       │                         │   Creates one request per
       │                         │   (scac × originPort × destPort) combination
       │                         │
       │                         └─ processRequests() [parallelStream]
       │                               │
       │                               ├─ RealTimeCacheDao.findCacheByCacheKey()
       │                               │   DynamoDB consistent read on os_realtime_cache
       │                               │
       │                               ├─ CACHE HIT (unexpired, not locked):
       │                               │   deserialize JSON → List<InttraSchedule>
       │                               │
       │                               ├─ CACHE MISS — acquireLock()
       │                               │   DynamoDB conditional write (NE locked)
       │                               │   If lock acquired:
       │                               │     getCarrierResponse() → HTTP GET/POST
       │                               │     mapCarrierResponseToSchedules()
       │                               │     cacheInttraSchedules() → DynamoDB write
       │                               │
       │                               └─ LOCKED / LOCK FAIL / NULL RESPONSE:
       │                                   ElasticSearchClient.getSchedulesForExternalApiFailure()
       │
       └─ filter: keep only schedules matching requested SCAC
          distinct() — remove duplicates
```

### DynamoDB Locking Protocol

The `os_realtime_cache` table uses an optimistic locking mechanism to prevent thundering herd:

```
 First thread arriving for a given cacheKey:
   Write: { cacheKey, locked="locked", expiresOn=now+180s }
   Condition: NOT (locked = "locked")
   If ConditionalCheckFailedException → lock already held → fall back to ES

 After carrier API response received:
   Write: { cacheKey, locked="unlocked", inttraSchedules=<json>, expiresOn=now+cacheExpiryMinutes }

 Carrier response respects Cache-Control header if useCacheControlHeader=true
```

---

## 7. Elasticsearch Index Design

### Index Naming Conventions

```
  oceanschedulesdata-{scac}-{date-suffix}
       │                │         │
       │                │         └── Date-partitioned suffix (e.g. 2026-05)
       │                └──────────── SCAC code, lowercase (e.g. mscu, maeu)
       └───────────────────────────── Configured via OceanSchedulesConfig.elasticSearchConfig.oceanschedulesIndex

  os-pre-fetch-{scac}-{date-suffix}
       │            │
       │            └── SCAC code, lowercase
       └───────────── Pre-fetched API results written by Loader Lambda
```

### Document Shape (ElasticSearch Schedule Document)

Derived from `ElasticSearchSchedule`, `ElasticSearchLeg`, and the field names used in queries:

```json
{
  "carrierId":                 1234,
  "scac":                     "MSCU",
  "carrierName":              "MSC Mediterranean Shipping Company",
  "vesselName":               "MSC DIANA",
  "voyageNumber":             "FM408A",
  "imoNumber":               "9839284",
  "serviceName":              "FAL1",
  "originUnloc":              "USLAX",
  "originCountry":            "United States",
  "originCityName":           "Los Angeles",
  "originSubdivision":        "California",
  "originTerminal":           "LBCT",
  "destinationUnloc":         "CNSHA",
  "destinationCountry":       "China",
  "destinationCityName":      "Shanghai",
  "destinationSubdivision":   "",
  "destinationTerminal":      "WSCT",
  "originDepartureDate":      "2026-05-10 00:00:00.0",
  "destinationArrivalDate":   "2026-05-28 00:00:00.0",
  "terminalCutoff":           "2026-05-08 00:00:00.0",
  "bkCutoff":                 "2026-05-07 00:00:00.0",
  "siCutoff":                 "2026-05-07 00:00:00.0",
  "vgmCutoff":                "2026-05-09 00:00:00.0",
  "scheduleType":             "direct",
  "scheduleSource":           "EDI",
  "totalDuration":            18,
  "allowsRORO":               false,
  "allowsBreakbulk":          false,
  "createdDate":              "2026-05-01 12:00:00.0",
  "legs": []
}
```

For transshipment schedules, `legs` contains one or more objects:

```json
{
  "sequence":               1,
  "transportID":            "9839284",
  "serviceName":            "FAL1",
  "transportType":          "Ocean Vessel",
  "transportName":          "MSC DIANA",
  "conveyanceNumber":       "FM408A",
  "departureUnloc":         "USLAX",
  "departureDate":          "2026-05-10 00:00:00.0",
  "arrivalUnloc":           "SGSIN",
  "arrivalDate":            "2026-05-22 00:00:00.0",
  "transshipmentIndicator": true,
  "transitDuration":        12
}
```

### Query Field Reference

| Field (ES name) | Type | Used in query |
|-----------------|------|---------------|
| `carrierId` | integer | `termsQuery` — match requested carrier IDs |
| `originDepartureDate.keyword` | keyword | `rangeQuery` — date window (ByDepartureDate) |
| `destinationArrivalDate.keyword` | keyword | `rangeQuery` — date window (ByArrivalDate) |
| `originUnloc.keyword` | keyword | `termsQuery` — all origin UNLOC alternatives |
| `destinationUnloc.keyword` | keyword | `termsQuery` — all destination UNLOC alternatives |
| `scac.keyword` | keyword | Aggregation — discover which SCACs have data |
| `scheduleSource.keyword` | keyword | Aggregation — distinguish EDI vs API sources |

### Carrier Discovery via ES Aggregation

`NetworkParticipantClient` determines which SCACs have indexed data using terms aggregations:

```
 SearchSourceBuilder
   query:  boolQuery → must: termsQuery(scheduleSource.keyword, "EDI")  [or "API"]
   agg:    terms("unique_carrier_id").field("scac.keyword").size(500)
   size:   0  (no documents, only aggregation buckets)
```

Result: set of SCAC strings with data in the index. Used to differentiate EDI vs API carriers.

### Index Management (Purge)

`CarrierService.purgeElasticSearchData(scac)` deletes both indices for a given SCAC:

```
  DELETE oceanschedulesdata-{scac}-*
  DELETE os-pre-fetch-{scac}-*
```

Executed via Jest `DeleteIndex` API; errors are captured and returned in result map.

---

## 8. SNS-Triggered Async Pipeline

### Pipeline Stages and SNS Topics

```
                    ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
                    │          SNS TOPICS (configured in SNSConfig)                    │
                    │                                                                  │
  Manual trigger ──►│  oceanSchedulesStagingArn  ──► [Staging Lambda / Worker]        │
  (via API admin)   │                                       │                         │
                    │                                       │ on S3 EDI data ready     │
                    │  oceanSchedulesLoaderArn   ◄──────────┘                         │
                    │          │                                                       │
                    │          └──► [Loader Lambda / Worker]                           │
                    │                       │ reads S3 files / calls carrier APIs      │
                    │                       │ writes to Elasticsearch                  │
                    │                       │ writes to DynamoDB (schedules_pro_staging)│
                    │  oceanSchedulesOutboundArn ◄──────────────────────────────────── │
                    │          │                                                       │
                    │          └──► [Outbound Lambda / Worker]                         │
                    │                       │ pushes schedules to subscriber systems   │
                    │                       │                                          │
                    │  oceanSchedulesAggregatorArn ◄─────────────────────────────────  │
                    │          │                                                       │
                    │          └──► [Aggregator Lambda / Worker]                       │
                    │                       │ aggregates / de-duplicates across SCACs  │
                    └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### MetaData Message Schema

Every SNS message carries a `MetaData` JSON payload:

```json
{
  "messageId":        "uuid-v4",
  "rootWorkflowId":   "uuid-v4",
  "parentWorkflowId": "uuid-v4",
  "workflowId":       "uuid-v4",
  "projections": {
    "scac":             "MSCU",
    "inttraCompanyIds": "optional-comma-separated-ids"
  }
}
```

When forwarding an existing MetaData (e.g. from Staging → Loader), the service:
1. Keeps `rootWorkflowId` and `parentWorkflowId` unchanged.
2. Regenerates `messageId` and `workflowId` with new UUIDs.

### OSProcessService Method Map

| Method | SNS Target | Input |
|--------|-----------|-------|
| `startStaging(scacs)` | StagingArn | List of SCAC codes |
| `startLoader(scacs)` | LoaderArn | List of SCAC codes |
| `startLoader(metaData)` | LoaderArn | MetaData from staging |
| `startOutbound(scacs)` | OutboundArn | List of SCAC codes |
| `startOutbound(scacs, inttraCompanyIds)` | OutboundArn | SCACs + company filter |
| `startOutbound(metaData)` | OutboundArn | MetaData from loader |
| `startAggregator(scacs)` | AggregatorArn | List of SCAC codes |
| `startAggregator(metaData)` | AggregatorArn | MetaData from outbound |
| `purgeData(scac)` | n/a | Deletes ES indexes + moves S3 objects |

### SCAC Validation for Pipeline Triggers

Before publishing, `OSProcessService` validates SCAC codes against two sources:

```
  ediDataScacCodes   = CarrierService.getCarrierScacCodesByEdiData()
     ↳ S3 sub-folder listing: s3://{bucket}/{osPath}/{scac}/
     ↳ Excludes "archive" and "temp" folders
     ↳ Extracts SCAC from path[2] in the folder hierarchy

  apiScacCodes       = CarrierService.getCarrierScacCodesByApiData()
     ↳ portPairDao.getScacsFromPortpair()          (MySQL)
     ↳ schedulesProStagingDao.getExistingAPICarrierScacCodes()  (DynamoDB)

  combined = union of both sets
  SCAC is valid if it exists in combined set
```

### SNSClient Retry Logic

```
  SNSClient.sendMessage(topicArn, content)
    ├─ Validates topicArn and content are non-null/empty
    ├─ Creates PublishRequest(topicArn, message)
    └─ Retry loop: up to 3 attempts
         ├─ On SdkClientException (retryable) → log and retry
         └─ On SdkClientException (non-retryable) → throw RuntimeException
```

---

## 9. Recent Searches — Data Flow and Deduplication

```
  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                     PUT /recentsearches                                       │
  │  Client sends: { originPort, destinationPort, ...metadata }                  │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                              │
  ┌───────────────────────────▼──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │ RecentSearchService.saveRecentLocationSearch(locationSearch, userId)          │
  │                                                                               │
  │  1. userDataDao.selectRecentSearch(userId)                                   │
  │     ─ UserDataMapper.select(userId, RECENT_SEARCH)                           │
  │     ─ Reads JSON blob from schedule_user_data table                          │
  │     ─ Deserializes to List<LocationSearch>                                   │
  │                                                                               │
  │  2. Deduplication:                                                           │
  │     recentSearches = recentSearches.stream()                                 │
  │       .filter(e -> !inputLocationSearch.equals(e))  ← .equals() by value    │
  │       .collect(...)                                                           │
  │                                                                               │
  │  3. Append new item to end of list                                           │
  │                                                                               │
  │  4. Trim to 12 items (drop oldest if > 12):                                 │
  │     int skipped = Math.max(0, list.size() - 12)                             │
  │     list.stream().skip(skipped).collect(...)                                 │
  │                                                                               │
  │  5. userDataDao.insertOrUpdateRecentSearch(userId, list)                     │
  │     ─ Serializes List<LocationSearch> → JSON string                          │
  │     ─ UserDataMapper.insertOrUpdate(ScheduleUserData)                        │
  │     ─ MySQL UPSERT on schedule_user_data(userId, userDataType, content)     │
  │     ─ @Transactional                                                         │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                     GET /recentsearches                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                              │
  ┌───────────────────────────▼──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │ RecentSearchService.getRecentSearch(userId)                                   │
  │                                                                               │
  │  1. selectRecentSearch(userId) → List<LocationSearch>                        │
  │                                                                               │
  │  2. enrichWithGeographyData() — parallelStream:                              │
  │     For each LocationSearch:                                                 │
  │       GeographyClient.getGeoLocationDataByCode(originPort)                  │
  │         → set origin, originWithoutSubdivision, originDetails               │
  │       GeographyClient.getGeoLocationDataByCode(destinationPort)             │
  │         → set destination, destinationWithoutSubdivision, destinationDetails│
  │                                                                               │
  │  3. filter() — remove any entries where origin or destination is still null  │
  │                                                                               │
  │  4. Lists.reverse() — return in reverse-chronological order                  │
  │                                                                               │
  │  Returns List<LocationSearch> (max 12, most recent first)                   │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Deduplication Semantics

`LocationSearch.equals()` compares by value (Lombok `@Data` generates `equals` from all fields). If a user searches the same origin/destination pair again, the previous entry is removed and the new one appended at the end, making it the most recent. The list always grows from index 0 (oldest) to index n-1 (newest), and is reversed before returning to the client.

---

## 10. Service Enablement CRUD Flow

Service enablement records control token-bucket rate limiting for external carrier APIs in downstream batch processes.

### Data Model

```
  ServiceEnablement {
    id                  long        (auto-increment PK)
    externalServiceName String      (unique — maps to ExternalServiceDefinition.name)
    application         String
    enabledFlag         boolean
    description         String
    tokenCount          Integer     (must be > 0)
    tokenInterval       Integer     (must be > 0)
    tokenIntervalUnit   String      (must be a valid java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit)
    createdBy           String
    createdDate         LocalDateTime
    lastModifiedBy      String
    lastModifiedDate    LocalDateTime
  }
```

### CRUD Operations

```
  GET /carrier/service-enablement
  ├── Optional ?externalServiceName= filter
  ├── portPairDao.getAllServiceEnablements()
  └── Returns all (or filtered) ServiceEnablement records

  POST /carrier/service-enablement
  ├── Security: companyId == 1000  (INTTRA internal only)
  ├── Validate:
  │    - externalServiceName, tokenIntervalUnit, tokenCount, tokenInterval not blank
  │    - tokenInterval > 0, tokenCount > 0
  │    - tokenIntervalUnit is valid TimeUnit enum value
  │    - No existing record with same externalServiceName (checked in-memory)
  ├── Set: createdBy, lastModifiedBy, createdDate, lastModifiedDate
  └── portPairDao.addServiceEnablement()  → MySQL INSERT

  PUT /carrier/service-enablement/{id}
  ├── Security: companyId == 1000
  ├── Path param id must match body id
  ├── Existing record must be found by id
  ├── No other record with same externalServiceName (conflict check)
  ├── Preserve createdDate and createdBy from existing record
  ├── Update lastModifiedBy, lastModifiedDate
  └── portPairDao.updateServiceEnablement()  → MySQL UPDATE
```

### Validation Guard Rail

`tokenIntervalUnit` is validated with `TimeUnit.valueOf(value)`. Accepted values: `NANOSECONDS`, `MICROSECONDS`, `MILLISECONDS`, `SECONDS`, `MINUTES`, `HOURS`, `DAYS`.

---

## 11. REST API Summary

Base path (configured in YAML): `/oceanschedules`

### Resource: `/schedule`

| Method | Path | Required Roles | Key Parameters | Returns |
|--------|------|---------------|----------------|---------|
| GET | `/schedule` | `OCEANSCHEDULE_API_USER`, `OCEANSCHEDULE_USER`, `NETWORK_ADMIN` | originPort, destinationPort, searchDate, searchDateType, weeksOut (required); scacs, directOnly, includeNearbyOriginPorts, includeNearbyDestinationPorts (optional) | `List<InttraSchedule>` |

### Resource: `/carrier`

| Method | Path | Required Roles | Key Parameters | Returns |
|--------|------|---------------|----------------|---------|
| GET | `/carrier` | `OCEANSCHEDULE_API_USER`, `OCEANSCHEDULE_USER`, `NETWORK_ADMIN` | — | `List<CarrierData>` |
| GET | `/carrier/port-pair` | same | scac, loadPortUnCode, destinationPortUnCode, supportedByCarrier (all optional) | `List<PortPair>` |
| GET | `/carrier/port-pair/{id}` | same | id (path) | `PortPair` |
| POST | `/carrier/port-pair` | same | `PortPair` JSON body | `PortPair` |
| PUT | `/carrier/port-pair/{id}/{supportedByCarrier}` | same | id, supportedByCarrier (path) | `PortPair` |
| PUT | `/carrier/port-pair/{id}/refreshRequestPayload` | same | id (path) | `PortPair` (updated requestPayload) |
| DELETE | `/carrier/port-pair/{id}` | same | id (path) | 204 No Content |
| GET | `/carrier/service-enablement` | same | externalServiceName (optional query) | `List<ServiceEnablement>` |
| POST | `/carrier/service-enablement` | same (+ companyId=1000) | `ServiceEnablement` JSON body | `ServiceEnablement` |
| PUT | `/carrier/service-enablement/{id}` | same (+ companyId=1000) | id (path), `ServiceEnablement` JSON body | `ServiceEnablement` |

### Resource: `/apicarriers`

| Method | Path | Required Roles | Returns |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|
| GET | `/apicarriers` | `OCEANSCHEDULE_USER`, `NETWORK_ADMIN` | `List<CarrierData>` filtered to API data source type |

### Resource: `/recentsearches`

| Method | Path | Required Roles | Body | Returns |
|--------|------|---------------|------|---------|
| GET | `/recentsearches` | `OCEANSCHEDULE_USER` | — | `List<LocationSearch>` (most recent first, max 12) |
| PUT | `/recentsearches` | `OCEANSCHEDULE_USER` | `LocationSearch` JSON | 204 No Content |

### Resource: `/user-preferences`

| Method | Path | Required Roles | Body | Returns |
|--------|------|---------------|------|---------|
| GET | `/user-preferences` | `OCEANSCHEDULE_USER` | — | `UserPreference` or 204 No Content |
| PUT | `/user-preferences` | `OCEANSCHEDULE_USER` | `UserPreference` JSON | 204 No Content |

### Resource: `/vesseldetails`

| Method | Path | Required Roles | Key Parameters | Returns |
|--------|------|---------------|----------------|---------|
| GET | `/vesseldetails` | `OCEANSCHEDULE_USER`, `NETWORK_ADMIN` | imoNumber (query) | `VesselDetails` or 204 No Content |

### Resource: `/process-maintenance`

| Method | Path | Required Roles | Body / Query | Returns |
|--------|------|---------------|-------------|---------|
| POST | `/process-maintenance/staging/start` | `OCEANSCHEDULE_ADMIN_USER`, `NETWORK_ADMIN` | scacs (query, comma-separated) | `List<Map>` with per-SCAC submission status |
| POST | `/process-maintenance/loader/start` | same | scacs (query) OR `MetaData` body | `List<Map>` |
| POST | `/process-maintenance/outbound/start` | same | scacs + optional inttraCompanyIds (query) OR `MetaData` body | `List<Map>` |
| POST | `/process-maintenance/aggregator/start` | same | scacs (query) OR `MetaData` body | `List<Map>` |
| DELETE | `/process-maintenance/purge` | same | scac (query, single value) | `List<Map>` with ES + S3 purge results |

---

## 12. Validation Rules

### Schedule Search — Required Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Constraint | Error Code |
|-----------|------|------------|------------|
| `originPort` | String | Must be present and non-empty; must resolve to a valid Geography record | 4400 (missing), 4415 (invalid) |
| `destinationPort` | String | Must be present and non-empty; must resolve to a valid Geography record | 4400 (missing), 4420 (invalid) |
| `searchDate` | String | Must be present; must parse as `yyyy-MM-dd` | 4400 (missing), 4410 (format) |
| `searchDateType` | String | Must be `ByDepartureDate` or `ByArrivalDate` (exact case) | 4400 (missing), 4411 (invalid type) |
| `weeksOut` | Integer | Must be an integer in the range **[1, 6]** inclusive | 4400 (missing), 4425 (out of range) |

### Schedule Search — Optional Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Constraint | Error Code |
|-----------|------|---------|------------|------------|
| `scacs` | String | all valid SCACs | Comma-separated; invalid codes silently ignored | — |
| `directOnly` | Boolean | `false` | Must be `true` or `false` (case-insensitive) | 4430 |
| `includeNearbyOriginPorts` | Boolean | `false` | Must be `true` or `false` | 4412 |
| `includeNearbyDestinationPorts` | Boolean | `false` | Must be `true` or `false` | 4413 |
| `services` | String | — | Accepted but not used in filtering | — |
| `vesselName` | String | — | Accepted but not used in filtering | — |

### Port-Pair CRUD Validation

| Rule | Details |
|------|---------|
| scac required | Non-blank; must map to a known `PortPairRequestBuilder` |
| loadPortUnCode required | Non-blank; must resolve via `GeographyClient` |
| destinationPortUnCode required | Non-blank; must resolve via `GeographyClient` |
| Origin ≠ Destination | `loadPortUnCode.equalsIgnoreCase(destinationPortUnCode)` → 400 |
| Uniqueness on POST | Duplicate scac+load+dest combination → 400 (`DUPLICATE_ENTRY_...`) |

### Service Enablement Validation

| Rule | Details |
|------|---------|
| Required fields | `externalServiceName`, `tokenIntervalUnit`, `tokenCount`, `tokenInterval` |
| Positive values | `tokenInterval > 0`, `tokenCount > 0` |
| tokenIntervalUnit | Must be a valid `java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit` constant |
| Unique externalServiceName | No other record with same name allowed (checked in-memory before insert) |
| Company restriction | Only users with `companyId == 1000` may create/update |

---

## 13. Exception Code Reference

### MercuryOSRequestException (HTTP 400)

| Code | Enum | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| 4000 | `GENERIC_BAD_REQUEST` | Bad request. |
| 4100 | `INVALID_REQUEST_PAYLOAD` | Invalid request payload. |
| 4400 | `MISSING_REQUIRED_QUERY_PARAM` | Missing required query param. |
| 4410 | `INVALID_SEARCH_DATE_FORMAT` | Invalid search date format. |
| 4411 | `INVALID_SEARCH_DATE_TYPE` | Invalid parameter searchDateType. Must be one of [ByDepartureDate, ByArrivalDate] |
| 4412 | `INVALID_NEARBY_ORIGIN_PORTS_PARAM_FORMAT` | Invalid parameter format for includeNearbyOriginPorts. Must be 'true' or 'false'. |
| 4413 | `INVALID_NEARBY_DESTINATION_PORTS_PARAM_FORMAT` | Invalid parameter format for includeNearbyDestinationPorts. Must be 'true' or 'false'. |
| 4415 | `INVALID_ORIGIN` | Invalid origin UN location code. |
| 4420 | `INVALID_DESTINATION` | Invalid destination UN location code. |
| 4425 | `INVALID_WEEKS_OUT` | Weeks out must be a whole number between 1 to 6 |
| 4430 | `INVALID_DIRECT_ONLY_FORMAT` | Invalid parameter format for directOnly. Must be 'true' or 'false'. |

### MercuryOSServiceException (HTTP 500)

| Code | Enum | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| 3100 | `GENERIC_SERVICE_EXCEPTION` | An error occurred |
| 3101 | `RESOURCE_FETCH_EXCEPTION` | Resource fetch exception. |
| 3102 | `RESOURCE_CREATE_EXCEPTION` | Resource create exception. |
| 3103 | `RESOURCE_UPDATE_EXCEPTION` | Resource update exception. |
| 3104 | `RESOURCE_PATCH_EXCEPTION` | Resource patch exception. |
| 3105 | `RESOURCE_DELETE_EXCEPTION` | Resource delete exception. |
| 3300 | `REST_CLIENT_UNKNOWN_METHOD_REQUEST` | Unknown rest client method request |
| 3301 | `REST_CLIENT_REQUEST_FAILURE` | Rest client request failed. |
| 3302 | `REST_CLIENT_WEBTARGET_BUILD_FAILURE` | Rest client webtarget build failure. |
| 3303 | `REST_CLIENT_INVALID_ELASTIC_SEARCH_URL` | Rest client invalid elastic search url. |
| 3305 | `REST_CLIENT_GET_FAILURE` | Rest client failed to resolve get request. |
| 3310 | `REST_CLIENT_POST_FAILURE` | Rest client failed to resolve post request. |
| 3320 | `REST_CLIENT_PUT_FAILURE` | Rest client failed to resolve put request. |
| 3330 | `REST_CLIENT_PATCH_FAILURE` | Rest client failed to resolve patch request. |
| 3340 | `REST_CLIENT_DELETE_FAILURE` | Rest client failed to resolve delete request. |
| 3350 | `REST_CLIENT_RESPONSE_MAPPING_ERROR` | Rest client failed to map response. |
| 3399 | `REST_CLIENT_RESOURCE_UNKNOWN_ERROR` | Rest client resource unknown error. |
| 3400 | `REST_CLIENT_RESOURCE_BAD_REQUEST` | Rest client request failure. |
| 3404 | `REST_CLIENT_RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND` | Rest client resource not found. |
| 3415 | `REST_CLIENT_RESOURCE_UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE` | Rest client resource unsupported media type. |
| 3500 | `REST_CLIENT_RESOURCE_ISE` | Rest client resource internal server error. |
| 3501 | `REST_CLIENT_RESOURCE_NOT_IMPLEMENTED` | Rest client resource not implemented. |
| 3502 | `REST_CLIENT_RESOURCE_BAD_GATEWAY` | Rest client resource bad gateway. |
| 3503 | `REST_CLIENT_RESOURCE_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE` | Rest client resource service unavailable. |
| 3504 | `REST_CLIENT_RESOURCE_GATEWAY_TIMEOUT` | Rest client resource gateway timeout. |
| 3511 | `REST_CLIENT_NETWORK_AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED` | Rest client network authentication required. |
| 3550 | `REST_CLIENT_FAILURE_TO_ADD_AUTHORIZATIONS` | Rest client failure to add authorizations. |
| 3551 | `REST_CLIENT_AUTHORIZATIONS_INVALID_ELASTIC_SCOPE_TIME` | Rest client invalid elastic scope authorization time. |
| 3552 | `REST_CLIENT_AUTHORIZATIONS_INVALID_ALROGITHM` | Rest client invalid authorization algorithm. |
| 3553 | `REST_CLIENT_AUTHORIZATIONS_INVALID_KEY_IN_KEYSPEC` | Rest client invalid key in keyspec. |
| 3601 | `INTTRA_FALLBACK_SCHEDULE_DATA_RESOURCE_NOT_DEFINED` | INTTRA fallback schedule data resource not defined. |
| 3602 | `INTTRA_CARRIER_DATA_RESOURCE_NOT_DEFINED` | INTTRA carrier data resource not defined. |
| 3603 | `INTTRA_FALLBACK_RESOURCE_COMMUNICATION_FAILURE` | Cannot communicate with INTTRA schedule data resource. |
| 3604 | `DATE_CONVERSION_EXCEPTION` | Date conversion exception. |
| 3651 | `TERMINAL_CUT_OFF_RETRIEVAL_FAILURE` | Failed to retrieve terminal cut off details. |
| 3701 | `NO_CARRIER_DATA_FOUND` | No carrier data found. |
| 3751 | `API_REQUEST_CONFIGURATOR_NOT_AVAILABLE` | No api request configurator is available to configure external request |
| 3801 | `SCHEDULE_TRANSLATOR_NOT_AVAILABLE` | No translator is available to interpret schedule data. |

### Exception Mapper Registration

| Mapper class | Catches | HTTP Response |
|-------------|---------|---------------|
| `RequestExceptionMapper` | `MercuryOSRequestException` | 400 Bad Request |
| `ServiceExceptionMapper` | `MercuryOSServiceException` | 500 Internal Server Error |
| `SecurityExceptionMapper` | Security/auth exceptions | 401 / 403 |
| `UnrecognizedPropertyExceptionMapper` | `UnrecognizedPropertyException` (Jackson) | 400 Bad Request |

---

## 14. Guice Dependency Injection Wiring

### Module Structure

```
 OceanSchedulesApplication.main()
       │
       └─ InttraServer.builder()
              ├─ moduleGenerator: OceanschedulesModule::new
              └─ moduleGenerator: MyCustomBatisModule (MySQL / MyBatis)
```

### OceanschedulesModule Bindings

```
 Single-instance bindings:
   bind(OceanSchedulesConfig.class)      → configuration instance
   bind(AmazonSNS.class)                 → AmazonSNSClientBuilder.standard()
   bind(AmazonS3.class)                  → AmazonS3ClientBuilder.standard()
   bind(AmazonDynamoDB.class)            → DynamoSupport.newClient(dynamoDbConfig)
   bind(DynamoDBMapperConfig.class)      → DynamoSupport.newDynamoDBMapperConfig(...)
   bind(DynamoDBMapper.class)            → DynamoSupport.newMapper(...)

 Named ServiceDefinition bindings:
   For each entry in config.mercuryServiceDefinitions:
     bind(ServiceDefinition.class)
       .annotatedWith(Names.named(def.getName()))
       .toInstance(def)
   Typical entries: "participants", "geography", "auth", etc.

 Named ExternalServiceDefinition bindings:
   For each entry in config.externalServiceDefinitions:
     bind(ExternalServiceDefinition.class)
       .annotatedWith(Names.named(def.getName()))
       .toInstance(def)
   Examples: "maersk-os", "maersk-location", "msc", "cma", "zim", "hmm", etc.

 JestModule (Elasticsearch):
   install(new JestModule(config.elasticSearchConfig))
   → Provides JestClient singleton

 Multibinder<ExternalClient>:
   Currently empty set (bindings commented out — all traffic goes to ES)

 Multibinder<PortPairRequestBuilder>:
   requestBuilderBinder.addBinding().to(MaerskPortPairBuilder.class)
   requestBuilderBinder.addBinding().to(MscPortpairBuilder.class)
   requestBuilderBinder.addBinding().to(CmaPortpairBuilder.class)
   requestBuilderBinder.addBinding().to(ZimPortpairBuilder.class)
   requestBuilderBinder.addBinding().to(MarfretPortpairBuilder.class)
   requestBuilderBinder.addBinding().to(SwirePortpairBuilder.class)
   requestBuilderBinder.addBinding().to(HapagLloydPortpairBuilder.class)
   requestBuilderBinder.addBinding().to(SeaLeadPortpairBuilder.class)
   requestBuilderBinder.addBinding().to(NeptunePortpairBuilder.class)
   requestBuilderBinder.addBinding().to(HmmPortpairBuilder.class)
   requestBuilderBinder.addBinding().to(EvergreenPortPairBuilder.class)
   requestBuilderBinder.addBinding().to(WisetechPortpairBuilder.class)
```

### Injection Graph (simplified)

```
 ScheduleResource
   └── ScheduleSearchService
         ├── UserSearchRequestValidator
         │     ├── CarrierService
         │     │     ├── NetworkParticipantClient
         │     │     │     ├── NetworkServiceClient (JAX-RS client)
         │     │     │     ├── JestClient (ES)
         │     │     │     ├── PortPairDao
         │     │     │     └── SchedulesProStagingDao
         │     │     ├── GeographyClient
         │     │     ├── S3Service
         │     │     ├── JestClient
         │     │     ├── PortPairDao → PortPairMapper (MyBatis)
         │     │     ├── PortPairBuilderFactory → Set<PortPairRequestBuilder>
         │     │     └── SchedulesProStagingDao → DynamoDBMapper
         │     ├── GeographyClient → NetworkServiceClient
         │     └── OceanSchedulesConfig
         ├── InttraScheduleCollector
         │     ├── ElasticSearchClient → JestClient + CarrierService
         │     └── ExternalClientFactory → Set<ExternalClient> (empty)
         └── EnrichmentService
               ├── GeographyClient
               ├── CutoffOffsetService → ScheduleCutoffOffsetDao → ScheduleCutoffOffsetMapper
               └── NetworkParticipantClient

 OSProcessResource
   └── OSProcessService
         ├── CarrierService
         ├── SNSClient → AmazonSNS
         └── OceanSchedulesConfig

 CarrierResource
   └── CarrierService (see above)

 RecentSearchResource
   └── RecentSearchService
         ├── UserDataDao → UserDataMapper (MyBatis)
         └── GeographyClient
```

### ServiceCache (Guava LoadingCache)

`NetworkParticipantClient` wraps its carrier data in a `ServiceCache<String, List<CarrierData>>`:

```
  CacheBuilder
    .expireAfterAccess(1440, TimeUnit.MINUTES)   // 24-hour TTL
    .build(CacheLoader)                           // lazy load on first access
```

On cache miss the loader:
1. Queries Participants API for VO and NVO network function codes.
2. Queries Elasticsearch for API and EDI SCAC aggregations.
3. Merges results and tags each carrier with its data source types.

---

## 15. Configuration Properties Reference

All properties are read from the Dropwizard YAML configuration file. The root type is `OceanSchedulesConfig`.

### Database (MySQL / Aurora)

```yaml
database:
  driverClass: software.aws.rds.jdbc.mysql.Driver
  url: jdbc:mysql://...
  user: ...
  password: ...
  # DataSourceFactory properties (Dropwizard)
```

### DynamoDB

```yaml
dynamoDbConfig:
  region: us-east-1
  tableSuffix: ""            # optional suffix for table names
  useLocalDynamo: false
  localDynamoUri: ...        # only for local dev
```

DynamoDB tables:
- `os_realtime_cache` — carrier API response cache with TTL and locking
- `schedules_pro_staging` — staging store for pipeline

### Elasticsearch

```yaml
elasticSearchConfig:
  endpointUrl:        https://<ES-endpoint>:443
  region:             us-east-1
  service:            es
  username:           <optional>
  password:           <optional>
  connTimeoutMillis:  3000
  readTimeoutMillis:  3000
  oceanschedulesIndex: oceanschedulesdata   # base index name (wildcard suffix applied in code)
  maxRetries:         3
```

### SNS

```yaml
snsConfig:
  oceanSchedulesStagingArn:    arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:...:os-staging
  oceanSchedulesLoaderArn:     arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:...:os-loader
  oceanSchedulesOutboundArn:   arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:...:os-outbound
  oceanSchedulesAggregatorArn: arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:...:os-aggregator
```

### S3

```yaml
s3Config:
  oceanSchedulesBucket:        inttra-mercury-os-data
  oceanSchedulesPurgePath:     purge/
  oceanSchedulesPurgeSourcePath:
    - schedules/edi/
    - schedules/api/
  oceanSchedulesPaths:
    - schedules/edi/
    - schedules/api/
```

SCAC code is derived from S3 folder structure:
`s3://{bucket}/{osPath}/{SCAC}/` → `prefix.split("/")[2]` = SCAC

### Surrounding Port Mapping (Nearby Ports Feature)

```yaml
surroundingPortMapping:
  CNSHA: shanghai-group
  CNSHG: shanghai-group
  USLAX: la-long-beach
  USLGB: la-long-beach
  # ...
```

Keys are UN location codes. Values are group names. Ports sharing the same group name form a "port cluster" — searching for one includes all others in the same cluster when `includeNearbyOriginPorts=true` or `includeNearbyDestinationPorts=true`.

### Mercury Internal Service Definitions

```yaml
mercuryServiceDefinitions:
  - name: participants
    uri: https://network-services-host/participants
  - name: geography
    uri: https://network-services-host/geography
  - name: auth
    uri: https://auth-service-host/token
  # ...
```

### External Carrier Service Definitions

```yaml
externalServiceDefinitions:
  - name: maersk-os
    uri: https://api.maersk.com/schedules/point-to-point
    method: GET
    scacs: [MAEU, SEAU, SEJJ]
    retry: 2
    cacheExpiryMinutes: 60
    useCacheControlHeader: true
    headers:
      Consumer-Key: <key>
    queryParams:
      vesselOperatorCarrierCode: MAEU
      dateRange: P8W

  - name: msc
    uri: https://www.msc.com/api/feature/tools/...
    method: POST
    scacs: [MSCU]
    retry: 2
    cacheExpiryMinutes: 30
    # ...

  - name: maersk-location
    uri: https://api.maersk.com/locations
    method: GET
    scacs: [MAEU]
    # ...

  # ... (one entry per carrier/group)
```

### Carrier-Specific Auth Service Definitions

```yaml
mscAuthServiceDefinitions:
  uri: https://msc-auth-host/oauth/token
  clientId: ...
  clientSecret: ...
  # ...

oneAuthServiceDefinitions:
  uri: https://one-auth-host/...
  # ...

zimAuthServiceDefinitions: ...
evergreenAuthServiceDefinitions: ...

timezoneServiceDefinitions:
  uri: https://timezone-service-host/...
  # ...
```

### Swagger / API Documentation

Generated at compile time via `swagger-maven-plugin`:
- Base path: `/oceanschedules`
- Scheme: `https`
- Output: `generated/swagger-ui/oceanschedules-api-1.0.json`
- Resources scanned: `ScheduleResource` only (other resources documented via JavaDoc annotations)

---

*End of document*
